dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.description: Monitor collections, events, funds, collectors, and payment activity.

events.title: Events
events.description: Manage fundraising campaigns, collection goals, and event timelines.

contributions.title: Contributions
contributions.description: Comprehensive audit of all funds received across every event and channel.

selfDonations.title: Self-Donations
selfDonations.description: Monitor and audit direct contributions made by registered users.

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Monitor payment attempts, provider references, and real-time transaction status.

receipts.title: Receipts
receipts.description: Digital ledger of all generated donor receipts and verification statuses.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Performance analytics, financial trends, and event-based collection reporting.

collectors.title: Collectors
collectors.description: Manage field collectors, assignments, performance, and field operations.

donors.title: Donors
donors.description: Understand contributor history, giving patterns, and receipt activity.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage system access for admins, supervisors, and field collectors.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage organization profile, branding, and system-wide configurations.

settlements.title: Settlements
settlements.description: Manage cash reconciliation, field agent handovers, and treasury settlements.
